SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields #7235

DANIEL BORENSTEIN, Esq. for Plaintiff: EDWARD DOLLARD.
Plaintiff's Witness Brenda EDWARD DOLLARD was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant ALLONTE GAINO (ONLY).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 350 WALLER, San Francisco, CA.
The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Case Settled, Settlement Agreement Filed, JudgeEllen Chaitin, Clerk J. Willis-McGhee, not reported.
